Variables.Name: OverrideVisibleActors
Variables.Description: Array of actors that will always be considered visible by Precomputed Visibility when viewed from inside this volume.

Variables.Name: OverrideInvisibleActors
Variables.Description: Array of actors that will always be considered invisible by Precomputed Visibility when viewed from inside this volume.

Variables.Name: OverrideInvisibleLevels
Variables.Description: Array of level names whose actors will always be considered invisible by Precomputed Visibility when viewed from inside this volume.
